title: Work Obligations (L55)
description: Follow-up obligations created from work decisions (L54) and policy enforcement (L16). Tracks remediation tasks, policy-mandated actions, and decision follow-ups with assignees and due dates.

decision_id.description: FK to L54 work_decision_records. Decision that created this obligation.

policy_id.description: FK to L16 cp_policies. Optional policy that mandated this obligation.

work_unit_id.description: FK to L52 work_execution_units. Context work unit (optional).

obligation_text.description: Clear description of what must be done. Should be actionable and measurable.

assigned_to_type.description: Type of actor assigned. Determines which layer assigned_to_id references.

assigned_to_id.description: Polymorphic FK. Resolves to: agent→L9, cp_agent→L15, human→L2.

completion_evidence_id.description: FK to L31 evidence. Proof of completion (nullable until completed).

modified_by.description: Actor who last modified this record.

row_version.description: Optimistic concurrency control. Increments on each update.
